author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Three bugs identified in into_storage_and_shape:
1. GPU Clone impl panics instead of returning Result — when Arc::try_unwrap fails on shared GPU tensors, .clone() calls the Clone impl which panics on clone_buffer failure or missing backend. The function returns FerrotorchResult but the Clone impl bypasses error propagation.
2. Offset ignored in Ok(inner)->Ok(storage) path — returns raw storage without accounting for inner.offset. For GPU tensors with nonzero offset (views), caller gets wrong data.
3. Offset ignored in Ok(inner)->Err(arc_storage) and Err(arc_inner)->GPU clone paths — clones entire GPU buffer ignoring offset.

Fix: Add try_clone() to TensorStorage that returns FerrotorchResult, and add a try_clone_subregion() for offset-aware GPU clones. Replace all .clone() calls in into_storage_and_shape with proper fallible clones that respect offset.
